reason: This is a bootstrap handoff from planning run run-010. The planning artifacts chose one canonical chain, the installed CHAIN.md matches that winner, and no executed step has produced evidence that weakens or closes the branch. The first logical chain step is also the correct next gate because it forces theorem-facing endpoint choice, admissibility, comparator selection, and same-currency gain definition before any geometric packaging is allowed to drift.
next_logical_chain_step: Freeze endpoint, admissibility standard, comparator, and candidate proposition
